age_groups.description: Result groupings by age category for a single event. Used when the document contains results for only one event. Each entry represents one age group with its ranked results.

results.description: Ranked list of individual results within this age group, ordered by finishing position. Extract all results as presented in the document.

rank.description: Finishing position of the athlete. Use an integer for numeric ranks (e.g., 1, 2, 3). Use a string for non-numeric outcomes such as 'DQ' (disqualified), 'DNS' (did not start), or 'DNF' (did not finish).

time.description: Recorded finish time exactly as printed in the results document (e.g., '1:23.45', '25.67', '2:05.89'). Preserve the original formatting including separators.

records.description: Record designations achieved by this result, if any. WR = World Record, CR = Championship Record, NR = National Record, AR = Americas Record, ER = European Record. A single result may break multiple records simultaneously. Return null if no records were set.

athlete_details.description: Identifying information about the athlete who achieved this result.

team.description: Team, club, or organisation the athlete represents, as printed in the results (e.g., 'Swim Club ABC', 'USC Trojans'). Extract exactly as stated.

athlete.description: Full name of the swimmer as printed in the results document. Preserve the name format used (e.g., 'LASTNAME, Firstname' or 'Firstname Lastname').

country.description: Country or nationality of the athlete, typically shown as a three-letter country code (e.g., 'USA', 'GBR', 'AUS') or full country name. Extract as printed in the document.

year_birth.description: Birth year of the athlete as listed in the results document. Return as a four-digit integer (e.g., 2001).

age_group.description: Age group classification label as printed in the results (e.g., 'Open', 'Junior', '15-16', '13-14', 'Senior'). Extract exactly as stated in the document.

championship.description: Full name of the swimming championship, competition, or meet as stated in the document (e.g., '2024 World Aquatics Championships', 'NCAA Division I Swimming & Diving Championships'). Extract as printed.

event_details.description: Details identifying the specific swimming event. Used when the document contains results for a single event.

sex.description: Gender category of the event (e.g., 'Men', 'Women', 'Mixed', 'Boys', 'Girls'). Extract as stated in the document.

length.description: Race distance and stroke type (e.g., '100m Freestyle', '200m Butterfly', '4x100m Medley Relay'). Extract exactly as printed in the document.

category.description: Event category or round (e.g., 'Final', 'Heats', 'Semi-Final', 'Prelim', 'Timed Final'). Extract as stated in the document.

events.description: Array of event entries when the document contains results for multiple events. Each entry includes its own event_details and age_groups. Use this structure instead of the top-level event_details and age_groups when multiple events are present.

event_details.description: Details identifying this specific swimming event within a multi-event document.

sex.description: Gender category of the event (e.g., 'Men', 'Women', 'Mixed', 'Boys', 'Girls'). Extract as stated in the document.

length.description: Race distance and stroke type (e.g., '100m Freestyle', '200m Butterfly', '4x100m Medley Relay'). Extract exactly as printed in the document.

category.description: Event category or round (e.g., 'Final', 'Heats', 'Semi-Final', 'Prelim', 'Timed Final'). Extract as stated in the document.

age_groups.description: Result groupings by age category for this event. Each entry represents one age group with its ranked results.

results.description: Ranked list of individual results within this age group, ordered by finishing position. Extract all results as presented in the document.

rank.description: Finishing position of the athlete. Use an integer for numeric ranks (e.g., 1, 2, 3). Use a string for non-numeric outcomes such as 'DQ' (disqualified), 'DNS' (did not start), or 'DNF' (did not finish).

time.description: Recorded finish time exactly as printed in the results document (e.g., '1:23.45', '25.67', '2:05.89'). Preserve the original formatting including separators.

records.description: Record designations achieved by this result, if any. WR = World Record, CR = Championship Record, NR = National Record, AR = Americas Record, ER = European Record. A single result may break multiple records simultaneously. Return null if no records were set.

athlete_details.description: Identifying information about the athlete who achieved this result.

team.description: Team, club, or organisation the athlete represents, as printed in the results (e.g., 'Swim Club ABC', 'USC Trojans'). Extract exactly as stated.

athlete.description: Full name of the swimmer as printed in the results document. Preserve the name format used (e.g., 'LASTNAME, Firstname' or 'Firstname Lastname').

country.description: Country or nationality of the athlete, typically shown as a three-letter country code (e.g., 'USA', 'GBR', 'AUS') or full country name. Extract as printed in the document.

year_birth.description: Birth year of the athlete as listed in the results document. Return as a four-digit integer (e.g., 2001).

age_group.description: Age group classification label as printed in the results (e.g., 'Open', 'Junior', '15-16', '13-14', 'Senior'). Extract exactly as stated in the document.
